title: oldenlandia lancifolia var. rutshuruensis
intro: Oldenlandia lancifolia var. rutshuruensis, also known as Rutshuru Oldenlandia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of herb that has been traditionally used in East African medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia lancifolia var. rutshuruensis include its ability to treat fever, malaria, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia lancifolia var. rutshuruensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
